query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO securityAlertTypes (name, description, category, severity, isActive, isSystem, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('Unauthorized Access Attempt', 'Multiple failed access attempts or watchlist match', 'breach', 'high', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Suspicious Activity', 'Anomalous behavior detected during verification', 'impact', 'medium', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Access Denied', 'Entry denied by guard or system', 'status', 'low', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Document Validation Failed', 'Invalid or expired document detected', 'view', 'high', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Face Match Failed', 'Face does not match document photo', 'action', 'high', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Plate Recognition Alert', 'Vehicle plate matched to watchlist', 'breach', 'medium', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('After-Hours Access', 'Access attempt outside normal hours', 'impact', 'medium', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('Duplicate Entry', 'Same person attempting multiple entries', 'status', 'low', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW());

('Face Match Failed', 'Face does not match document photo', 'action', 'high', 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
